HSIN-HSIN YUAN
Available forWorksContact 中

Documentary direction for artists, culture, and technology stories

HSIN-HSINYUAN

Documentary Director / Writer / Producer/ Cross-Cultural Storyteller

I direct and develop documentary stories for artists, culture, and technology teams working across Taiwan and international contexts. I help complex subjects become human, cinematic, and clear enough to travel.

Available for

I can enter a project early as a story partner, direct the shoot, shape the edit, or build repeatable editorial workflows for short-form factual content.

Creative developmentDirectingEditingResearchBilingual scriptsAI workflow design

Featured Works

Slow Steps
2026 / Director / Upcoming

Slow Steps

Slow steps. A closer look at becoming.

An upcoming work about movement, time, and becoming.

documentaryupcomingmovement
Challenge

Hold space for a quieter, slower story where transformation is felt through observation rather than explanation.

What I shaped

A patient visual language for movement, time, and becoming, currently in development for 2026.

Best for

Longer-form documentary, artist-led moving-image work, and projects that need a sensitive directorial eye.

Coming 2026
Tech Dreamers
2025 / Director / TaiwanPlus

Tech Dreamers

Taiwanese founders building the future.

From AI to deep tech, stories of people turning ideas into tomorrow.

technologyfoundersAIinterview
Challenge

Make technical founders and future-facing ideas understandable without flattening the people behind the systems.

What I shaped

Directed interviews and story structure around motivation, risk, and the human reason a technology matters.

Best for

Tech teams, founders, and brands that need complex work explained through documentary storytelling.

Watch the series
My Art, My Voice
2025 / Lead Documentary Director / TaiwanPlus

My Art, My Voice

Artists. Identity. Taiwan on the world stage.

A documentary on the Paris Cultural Olympiad, creative freedom, and the voices behind performance.

documentaryartsidentityParis Cultural Olympiad
24 artist groups
Challenge

Translate 24 artist groups and the cultural stakes of Taiwan's Paris Cultural Olympiad presence into an intimate story for international viewers.

What I shaped

Directed the documentary spine: artist interviews, emotional through-lines, cultural context, and the voice of performance beyond event coverage.

Best for

Artists, cultural institutions, festivals, and teams that need a project translated for audiences beyond its original context.

Press & Interviews

Official page Official program page TaiwanPlus Project press Cultural Olympiad documentary My Art, My Voice: Taiwan-France artist dialogue Mirror Media Interview Director interview: walking into the sea of creation Very Mulan

Interior / Spatial Brand Films
2021-2024 / Director / Editor / Gorgeous Space / 幸福空間

Interior / Spatial Brand Films

Design, product, and home stories shaped for watchable short-form video.

Across approximately three years of interior and spatial-brand production, I directed and edited films for residential design, renovation, designer portfolios, and branded lifestyle campaigns.

interior designbranded contentlifestyleediting
3 yrs interior / spatial production
20+ public links archived
LG / Samsung brand contexts
Challenge

Turn completed spaces, designer decisions, product placements, and client needs into stories that could serve viewers, studios, brands, and platform programming at once.

What I shaped

Directed and edited spatial narratives around layout, light, circulation, materials, lifestyle detail, small-space transformation, and branded product use.

Best for

Interior designers, lifestyle brands, home-product teams, and platforms that need practical, elegant, sales-supporting video stories.

Coming 2026
PTS Taigi - Bus Travel Factual Episodes
2020s / Planning / Script / PTS Taigi / 公視台語台

PTS Taigi - Bus Travel Factual Episodes

Local travel, public media, and Taiwanese-language factual storytelling.

Selected episode-planning work for a PTS Taigi travel-factual program built around bus routes, local memory, food, markets, and people along the road.

public mediatravel factualTaiwanese languagelocal culture
3+ episode leads archived
PTS public media
Challenge

Shape local travel material into episode logic that could hold route, place, encounter, language, and public-media pacing together.

What I shaped

Developed episode-planning and script structure for selected routes, keeping the credit compact here until the full episode list is confirmed.

Best for

Public-media programs, travel-factual formats, local culture stories, and multilingual or dialect-sensitive production.

Watch representative segment
Top Gear China: UK Special
2015 / China-side Director / Dragon TV / Oriental Satellite TV

Top Gear China: UK Special

A cross-border format shoot with the original UK Top Gear team.

Directed the China-side production for S02E05, the UK special of Top Gear China, coordinating format, location, and story needs across Chinese broadcast production and UK-facing material.

factual entertainmentbroadcastinternational formatUK production
200M viewers
9M previous series average
0.81 series rating record
#1 variety slot
Challenge

Bring an internationally recognizable factual-entertainment format into a Chinese broadcast context while working across teams, languages, locations, and production expectations.

What I shaped

Led the China-side directing work for the UK special, coordinating local production needs with the original UK Top Gear team and the broadcaster-facing episode structure.

Best for

International formats, broadcaster collaborations, factual entertainment, and high-pressure shoots that need cross-cultural production judgment.

Watch the full episode

Selected Impact

200M viewers for Top Gear China S02E05

The episode substantially outperformed the series' previous average audience.

#1 variety rating slot

The UK special set a 0.81 series rating record.

600K viewers in South India

The Tamil-language version of Overclocking was broadcast in South India.

NT$6M public funding secured

Funding records include Lying Game and Overclocking.

24 artist groups documented

My Art, My Voice and Taiwan in Motion documented Taiwan at the 2024 Paris Cultural Olympiad.

Who Should Contact Me

The clearest fit is work that needs cultural fluency, documentary listening, bilingual judgment, and a director who can turn complex material into human stories.

For Artists & Cultural Institutions

Documentary portraits, artist interviews, cultural programs, and international audience translation.

For Documentary / Factual Producers

Research-led story development, interview direction, field production, and cross-cultural coordination.

For Tech & Brand Teams

Founder stories, explainers, branded factual shorts, and human-centered technology narratives.

For AI-Language / Editorial Teams

Fact-checked bilingual scripts, tone judgment, language learning formats, and repeatable editorial workflows.

AI / Language Lab

A working space for fact-checked bilingual script workflows, short-form factual series, language judgment, and AI-assisted editorial systems.

Short-form factual series

Fact-Checked Bilingual Script Workflow

A fact-checked bilingual script workflow for explainers, artist statements, language learning, and branded short-form factual series.

Language, tone, culture

Documentary Listening for AI

A practice of judging speech by rhythm, intent, context, and whether a voice sounds human rather than generic.

Selected Archive

Earlier television, scripted, factual, and international collaboration work with platform performance and funding context.

Let’s build a story with signal.

For documentary, cultural, branded, AI-language, and cross-cultural production collaborations. Send a brief note about the project, timeline, and what kind of partner you need.
